notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. grounds into a force out, first baseman Casey Schmitt to shortstop Willy Adames. Ben Rice scores. Giancarlo Stanton out at 2nd. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. grounds into a force out, first baseman Casey Schmitt to shortstop Willy Adames. Ben Rice scores. Giancarlo Stanton out at 2nd. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Willy Adames reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames reaches on a fielding error by shortstop José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Jazz Chisholm Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. hit by pitch. Giancarlo Stanton to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.
